commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d79619fc7bf72c8ad4c0b42bce92f0fd3926c5db)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent compaction to return the last successful chunk summary on non-abort, non-timeout chunk failure, adds regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main updates `summary` chunk-by-chunk and loses that local value if a later chunk throws. The PR regression is also source-reproducible because its catch returns the default fallback before any generated chunk succeeds.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor/human follow-up because the external real-behavior proof gate is unmet and the remaining code defect must be fixed on the PR branch before merge.

target.title: fix(compaction): preserve partial summary on mid-chain chunk failure
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
